full_text:
Yao Guang 姚光
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yao Guang (姚光). He was wrapped in reeds and burnt, but survived due to having some sort of fire immunity. Yao Guang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
